rationale: The cited 2013 paper is referenced in the literature review as a prior extension of Kim, Fong, and DeSarbo (2012) that adds managerial constraints. In the citing paper, this citation mainly serves to map the existing latent class regression-with-variable-selection stream before introducing the new Ising-prior topic-based model. The citing study does not build its method directly on the 2013 constraints, nor does it use the 2013 paper as a core benchmark or source of key operational choices.
